message:
refactor: extract countColumnRows helper + QueryModeError in fragment-do

- types.ts: new countColumnRows(columns) helper replaces 7 duplicated
  `columns[0]?.pages.reduce((s, p) => s + p.rowCount, 0) ?? 0` patterns
- local-executor, query-do, master-do: all 7 call sites use the helper
- fragment-do: 2 plain Error throws → QueryModeError (MEMORY_EXCEEDED, QUERY_FAILED)
- master-do: 1 missed plain Error → QueryModeError (SCHEMA_MISMATCH)
